- `[2, idx, val]` - **将** `nums[idx]` 更新为 `val`。

**输出：** [2,1]

因此，最终 `answer` 为 `[3, 1, 0]` 。

struct FenwickTree {
    tree: Vec<i64>,
    size: usize,
}

impl FenwickTree {
    fn new(size: usize) -> Self {
        let mut tree = vec![0; size + 1];
        Self { tree, size }
    }

    fn update(&mut self, idx: usize, delta: i64) {
        let idx = idx + 1; // 1-based index
        while idx <= self.size {
            self.tree[idx] += delta;
            idx += idx & -idx;
        }
    }

    fn query(&self, idx: usize) -> i64 {
        let idx = idx + 1; // 1-based index
        let mut sum = 0;
        while idx > 0 {
            sum += self.tree[idx];
            idx -= idx & -idx;
        }
        sum
    }

    fn range_query(&self, l: usize, r: usize) -> i64 {
        self.query(r) - self.query(l - 1)
    }
}

struct FenwickTree {
    size: usize,
    tree: Vec<i32>,
}

impl FenwickTree {
    fn new(size: usize) -> Self {
        let mut tree = vec![0; size + 1];
        Self { size, tree }
    }

    fn update(&mut self, index: usize, delta: i32) {
        let index = index + 1; // 1-based index
        let mut i = index;
        while i <= self.size {
            self.tree[i] += delta;
            i += i & -i;
        }
    }

    fn query(&self, index: usize) -> i32 {
        let index = index + 1; // 1-based index
        let mut res = 0;
        let mut i = index;
        while i > 0 {
            res += self.tree[i];
            i -= i & -i;
        }
        res
    }

    fn range_query(&self, l: usize, r: usize) -> i32 {
        if l > r {
            return 0;
        }
        self.query(r) - self.query(l - 1)
    }
}
